original_question:
The base of the pyramid is a rectangle, in which the angle between the diagonals is $\alpha$. One of the lateral edges is perpendicular to the plane of the base, and the longest edge makes an angle $\beta$ with the plane of the base. The radius of the sphere circumscribed around the pyramid is $R$. Find the volume of the pyramid.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
